title: Kanpur Kidney Racket Bust: Doctor Couple Arrested, Organs Sold For Rs 60 Lakh, Donors Received Only Rs 9 Lakh
description: Reports indicate that doctors were brought in from Lucknow to carry out the procedures at these facilities. As per initial reports, each kidney was sold for as much as Rs 60 lakh, while donors were paid only around Rs 9 lakh.
